nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Routes an agent escalation to the right human role. Inserts to agent_escalations and notifies the human via email (lead-meeting-booked template adapted) + a future dashboard alert pulled from agent_escalations WHERE status='pending'. Slack/Teams webhook notification is documented as Phase 4 enhancement.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, client_id: $json.client_id, conversation_id: $json.conversation_id, reason: $json.reason, escalated_to_role: $json.escalated_to_role, escalated_to_user_id: $json.escalated_to_user_id, context_summary: $json.context_summary, status: 'pending', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: $('Carry Recipient').item.json.recipient_email || 'support@crystallux.org', vars: { first_name: 'team', message: 'AI Agent escalation: ' + $('Carry Recipient').item.json.reason + '\n\nContext: ' + ($('Carry Recipient').item.json.context_summary || ''), landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/escalations' } }) }}

nodes.name: Notify Human
nodes.notes: Reuses lead-meeting-booked template as a generic notification carrier. Phase 4 polish: dedicated agent-escalation.html template with severity coloring + direct link to the conversation.
